---
title: "SelectionPanel.tsx"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\SelectionPanel.tsx"
loc: 47
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.18
style_score: 3.81
intel_score: 2.00
overall_score: 4.85
---

## Intent
The `SelectionPanel.tsx` module provides the HTML-overlay container for the node selection interface. It uses `@react-three/drei`'s `Html` component to project traditional web UI elements into the 3D scene, enabling high-fidelity metadata display and interaction without WebGL rendering constraints.

## Interaction Protocol
This component is triggered when a node is clicked in the `NeuralGraph`. It manages the basic visibility and positioning of the selection UI, delegating the complex layout and content rendering to its shell and metric sub-components.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://react)
- [Html](file://@react-three/drei)
- [Node](file://../types/index.ts)

### Exports
- `SelectionPanel`
- `SelectionPanel`
